content.speakerText: Hey, thanks for meeting up! This place is cozy, right?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，谢谢你来见面！这地方挺温馨的，对吧？

options.text: Yeah, I love spots like this—perfect for chatting.

content.explanation: 正确答案使用了积极表达和具体理由（'perfect for chatting'），符合轻松开场的社交规范。其他选项语气消极、模糊或过于冷淡，不符合‘打破沉默、表达兴趣’的场景目标。

content.speakerText: Hi there! I’ve never been here before—what do you think of this park?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！我第一次来这儿——你觉得这个公园怎么样？

options.text: I absolutely love it! The trees and benches are so relaxing.

content.explanation: 正确答案用具体细节（'trees and benches'）和积极情感词（'absolutely love', 'relaxing'）展现了真诚的兴趣，符合初次问候的积极氛围。其他选项语气冷漠或敷衍，不利于建立连接。

content.speakerText: Wow, you’re here! I’ve heard so much about your art studio.
content.speakerTextCn: 哇，你来了！我早就听说你的艺术工作室了。

options.text: Yeah, it’s just a small room.
Thanks! I’m really proud of how it turned out—it’s my creative escape.
I don’t know what you’re talking about.

content.explanation: 正确答案既表达了感谢，又用积极语言（'proud', 'creative escape'）分享了个人情感，符合社交开场中展现真诚与开放的原则。其他选项贬低自己或回避回应，破坏对话氛围。

content.template: I'd like ___ book a coffee here sometime.
content.hint: 表达意愿时的常用结构
content.knowledgePoint: would like to do（表达意愿的核心句型）

content.template: This place is so ___—perfect for catching up!
content.hint: 描述让人放松、适合聊天的场所的常用形容词
content.knowledgePoint: 场景高频词汇（描述环境的积极形容词）

content.template: I’ve been wanting to ___ this spot for ages!
content.hint: 表达‘一直想体验某地’的动词搭配
content.knowledgePoint: 场景核心动词搭配（want to try a place）

content.speakerText: Hey, thanks for meeting up! This place is cozy, right?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨，谢谢你来见面！这地方挺温馨的，对吧？
expectedAnswers: Yeah, I love spots like this—perfect for chatting.
Definitely! I’ve been wanting to try this café for weeks.
It’s so nice! The lighting and music make it feel really warm.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否积极回应并延续了对话氛围
语言准确性：语法和词汇使用是否正确
表达自然度：是否像母语者一样自然流畅
关键词覆盖：是否使用了场景关键词如 'cozy', 'chatting', 'try' 等

content.speakerText: Hi! I’ve never been to this neighborhood before—what’s your favorite thing about it?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！我第一次来这个街区——你最喜欢这里哪一点？
expectedAnswers: I love the little bookshop on the corner—it’s got such a chill vibe.
The street art is amazing! Every time I walk by, I notice something new.
It’s peaceful compared to downtown. I come here to unwind after work.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否回应了对方的开放性问题并分享了个人感受
语言准确性：是否使用了恰当的形容词和动词搭配
表达自然度：是否避免机械背诵，有口语化表达
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'favorite thing', 'love', 'chill vibe', 'unwind' 等社交关键词

content.speakerText: You made it! I’ve heard so much about your photography—what’s your favorite subject to shoot?
content.speakerTextCn: 你来了！我早就听说你拍摄影像了——你最喜欢拍什么主题？
expectedAnswers: Thanks! I’m really into street photography—it captures real emotions.
I love shooting sunsets. There’s something magical about the golden hour.
People, definitely. I find their expressions tell the most interesting stories.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否感谢对方并具体回应了关于兴趣的问题
语言准确性：是否使用了正确的动词搭配（如 'into', 'shooting', 'capture'）
表达自然度：是否避免生硬回答，有个人情感投入
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 'favorite subject', 'love', 'capture', 'emotions' 等表达个人兴趣的关键词
